name: obsidian-mobile-plugin
description: UX enhancements with floating action button, context-aware toolbars, and gestures.

scripts.build: npm run format && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.copy-to-mobile-vault: kioclient5 --overwrite copy styles.css manifest.json main.js "mtp:/Armor X31 Pro/Internal shared storage/Documents/Obsidian/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-mobile-plugin/"

author: Justice Vellacott
